creator: chmiels@o2.pl
text:
Dell E6520 can't resume after suspend - power is on but nothing can be
seen on LCD. I did a procedure described in Handbook:

- sysctl debug.bootverbose=1
- sysctl debug.acpi.suspend_bounce=1
- acpiconf -s 3

Output from console:
